records.m_Talk_ENG: Bishop, do you think the others are all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bishop, do you think the others are all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bishop, do you think the others are all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I were stronger, I could've helped more...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I were stronger, I could've helped more...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I were stronger, I could've helped more...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Strength isn't just about your body, Dame Arius.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Strength isn't just about your body, Dame Arius.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Strength isn't just about your body, Dame Arius.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even just hoping for your comrades' victory is a source of great strength to them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even just hoping for your comrades' victory is a source of great strength to them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even just hoping for your comrades' victory is a source of great strength to them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I'll root for them from here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I'll root for them from here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I'll root for them from here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll cheer with all I've got so Liv, Sir Hansol, or the other knights don't lose!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll cheer with all I've got so Liv, Sir Hansol, or the other knights don't lose!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll cheer with all I've got so Liv, Sir Hansol, or the other knights don't lose!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. That sounds nice.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. That sounds nice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If they could see you now...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If they could see you now...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If they could see you now...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bishop, may I have a moment?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bishop, may I have a moment?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bishop, may I have a moment?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, someone's at the door.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, someone's at the door.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, someone's at the door.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll get it so you can rest, Bishop!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll get it so you can rest, Bishop!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll get it so you can rest, Bishop!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes! How can I help you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes! How can I help you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes! How can I help you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-Dame Arius.
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-Dame Arius.
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-Dame Arius.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... I'm sorry...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... I'm sorry...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... I'm sorry...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Was that... an explosion?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Was that... an explosion?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Was that... an explosion?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Ah... no
8v!!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Ah... no
8v!!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Ah... no
8v!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shaking like that over a little blood? Pathetic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shaking like that over a little blood? Pathetic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shaking like that over a little blood? Pathetic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this the state of the modern Order, where even runts like you dare call yourselves knights?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this the state of the modern Order, where even runts like you dare call yourselves knights?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this the state of the modern Order, where even runts like you dare call yourselves knights?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still as arrogant as ever, Sir Gilbert. Though your body's aged a bit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still as arrogant as ever, Sir Gilbert. Though your body's aged a bit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still as arrogant as ever, Sir Gilbert. Though your body's aged a bit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or maybe you've even gotten worse with that outdated sense of grandeur.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or maybe you've even gotten worse with that outdated sense of grandeur.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or maybe you've even gotten worse with that outdated sense of grandeur.

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-Carantisir. How did you get in here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-Carantisir. How did you get in here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-Carantisir. How did you get in here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The knights should've been guarding this place...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The knights should've been guarding this place...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The knights should've been guarding this place...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guarding? You mean the ones who screamed for their lives like cowards?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Guarding? You mean the ones who screamed for their lives like cowards?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Guarding? You mean the ones who screamed for their lives like cowards?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though to be fair, the puddles of blood they left did slow me down a little. So not a total failure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though to be fair, the puddles of blood they left did slow me down a little. So not a total failure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though to be fair, the puddles of blood they left did slow me down a little. So not a total failure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't spout nonsense! Not even you could get into HQ this easily!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't spout nonsense! Not even you could get into HQ this easily!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't spout nonsense! Not even you could get into HQ this easily!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What trickery did you pull?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What trickery did you pull?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What trickery did you pull?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Use your brain, old man. There's the Staff of Resurrection. Why would I bother making a move myself?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Use your brain, old man. There's the Staff of Resurrection. Why would I bother making a move myself?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Use your brain, old man. There's the Staff of Resurrection. Why would I bother making a move myself?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The day Dame Ascella hit HQ, I sent in a bait. One created by splitting off a part of my power through necromancy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The day Dame Ascella hit HQ, I sent in a bait. One created by splitting off a part of my power through necromancy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The day Dame Ascella hit HQ, I sent in a bait. One created by splitting off a part of my power through necromancy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You placed so much faith in your chivalry that you failed to watch your own people from within.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You placed so much faith in your chivalry that you failed to watch your own people from within.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You placed so much faith in your chivalry that you failed to watch your own people from within.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'd use necromancy for your own greed...? Have you abandoned the last shred of your chivalry?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You'd use necromancy for your own greed...? Have you abandoned the last shred of your chivalry?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You'd use necromancy for your own greed...? Have you abandoned the last shred of your chivalry?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't it more foolish not to use the cards in your hand?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't it more foolish not to use the cards in your hand?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't it more foolish not to use the cards in your hand?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's only a shame that once the Apostle's remains fade from this Staff, I can't use it again until I find another compatible host.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's only a shame that once the Apostle's remains fade from this Staff, I can't use it again until I find another compatible host.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's only a shame that once the Apostle's remains fade from this Staff, I can't use it again until I find another compatible host.

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-don't come any closer!
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-don't come any closer!
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-don't come any closer!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you've got at least a speck of spirit, enough to draw an Armament's interest?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you've got at least a speck of spirit, enough to draw an Armament's interest?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you've got at least a speck of spirit, enough to draw an Armament's interest?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, you're far too unskilled to be a knight representing your house.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, you're far too unskilled to be a knight representing your house.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, you're far too unskilled to be a knight representing your house.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-Bishop!
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-Bishop!
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-Bishop!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll give you credit. I spared his life, thanks to your grit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll give you credit. I spared his life, thanks to your grit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll give you credit. I spared his life, thanks to your grit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if I don't like your answer next, I won't be so merciful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if I don't like your answer next, I won't be so merciful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if I don't like your answer next, I won't be so merciful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swear obedience and hand over your Armament, daughter of Esquede.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swear obedience and hand over your Armament, daughter of Esquede.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swear obedience and hand over your Armament, daughter of Esquede.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do that, and I'll spare his life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do that, and I'll spare his life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do that, and I'll spare his life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah. To think Blue Shift has fallen this far.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah. To think Blue Shift has fallen this far.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah. To think Blue Shift has fallen this far.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you lack the courage to make a choice, I'll teach it to you myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you lack the courage to make a choice, I'll teach it to you myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you lack the courage to make a choice, I'll teach it to you myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-Bishop said... just cheering could be a real strength to our allies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-Bishop said... just cheering could be a real strength to our allies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-Bishop said... just cheering could be a real strength to our allies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I'll stay here... and cheer with everything I've got...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I'll stay here... and cheer with everything I've got...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I'll stay here... and cheer with everything I've got...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't lose, Fione!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't lose, Fione!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't lose, Fione!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I won't.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I won't.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I won't.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please watch over Bishop, Dame Arius.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please watch over Bishop, Dame Arius.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please watch over Bishop, Dame Arius.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you're the current Knight of Scorpio?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you're the current Knight of Scorpio?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you're the current Knight of Scorpio?

records.m_Talk_ENG: For someone so bound by tradition, you're rather bold. Doesn't suit a knight of virtue.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For someone so bound by tradition, you're rather bold. Doesn't suit a knight of virtue.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For someone so bound by tradition, you're rather bold. Doesn't suit a knight of virtue.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've heard of you from Dame Medea.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've heard of you from Dame Medea.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've heard of you from Dame Medea.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Carantisir de Letaria. Red Shift's captain, and once one of the strongest knights in the Order.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Carantisir de Letaria. Red Shift's captain, and once one of the strongest knights in the Order.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Carantisir de Letaria. Red Shift's captain, and once one of the strongest knights in the Order.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hoping I'll go easy on you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hoping I'll go easy on you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hoping I'll go easy on you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. That's exactly why I can't forgive you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. That's exactly why I can't forgive you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. That's exactly why I can't forgive you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To think someone with your power... would choose personal gain over protecting others.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To think someone with your power... would choose personal gain over protecting others.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To think someone with your power... would choose personal gain over protecting others.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, I can enforce justice because I'm strong enough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, I can enforce justice because I'm strong enough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, I can enforce justice because I'm strong enough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even the Administration values a single Counter over a dozen civilians, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even the Administration values a single Counter over a dozen civilians, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even the Administration values a single Counter over a dozen civilians, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just as I feared. You're beyond saving.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just as I feared. You're beyond saving.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just as I feared. You're beyond saving.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fione Lowell, the Knight of Scorpio, asks you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fione Lowell, the Knight of Scorpio, asks you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fione Lowell, the Knight of Scorpio, asks you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you fight for?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you fight for?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you fight for?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is the justice you pursue?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is the justice you pursue?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is the justice you pursue?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Power. The discipline born from absolute obedience under that power.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Power. The discipline born from absolute obedience under that power.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Power. The discipline born from absolute obedience under that power.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let me show you exactly what that means, daughter of House Lowell.

root.m_Talk_DEU: B-Bishop said... just cheering could be a real strength to our allies.
root.m_Talk_FRA: B-Bishop said... just cheering could be a real strength to our allies.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I'll stay here... and cheer with everything I've got...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I'll stay here... and cheer with everything I've got...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I'll stay here... and cheer with everything I've got...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't lose, Fione!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't lose, Fione!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't lose, Fione!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I won't.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I won't.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I won't.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please watch over Bishop, Dame Arius.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please watch over Bishop, Dame Arius.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please watch over Bishop, Dame Arius.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you're the current Knight of Scorpio?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you're the current Knight of Scorpio?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you're the current Knight of Scorpio?

root.m_Talk_ENG: For someone so bound by tradition, you're rather bold. Doesn't suit a knight of virtue.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For someone so bound by tradition, you're rather bold. Doesn't suit a knight of virtue.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For someone so bound by tradition, you're rather bold. Doesn't suit a knight of virtue.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've heard of you from Dame Medea.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've heard of you from Dame Medea.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've heard of you from Dame Medea.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Carantisir de Letaria. Red Shift's captain, and once one of the strongest knights in the Order.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Carantisir de Letaria. Red Shift's captain, and once one of the strongest knights in the Order.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Carantisir de Letaria. Red Shift's captain, and once one of the strongest knights in the Order.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hoping I'll go easy on you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hoping I'll go easy on you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hoping I'll go easy on you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. That's exactly why I can't forgive you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. That's exactly why I can't forgive you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. That's exactly why I can't forgive you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To think someone with your power... would choose personal gain over protecting others.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To think someone with your power... would choose personal gain over protecting others.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To think someone with your power... would choose personal gain over protecting others.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, I can enforce justice because I'm strong enough.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, I can enforce justice because I'm strong enough.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, I can enforce justice because I'm strong enough.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even the Administration values a single Counter over a dozen civilians, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even the Administration values a single Counter over a dozen civilians, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even the Administration values a single Counter over a dozen civilians, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just as I feared. You're beyond saving.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just as I feared. You're beyond saving.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just as I feared. You're beyond saving.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fione Lowell, the Knight of Scorpio, asks you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fione Lowell, the Knight of Scorpio, asks you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fione Lowell, the Knight of Scorpio, asks you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you fight for?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you fight for?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you fight for?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is the justice you pursue?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is the justice you pursue?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is the justice you pursue?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Power. The discipline born from absolute obedience under that power.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Power. The discipline born from absolute obedience under that power.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Power. The discipline born from absolute obedience under that power.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let me show you exactly what that means, daughter of House Lowell.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let me show you exactly what that means, daughter of House Lowell.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let me show you exactly what that means, daughter of House Lowell.
